chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْفَجْرِ مَا هُوَ وَ مَتَى يَحِلُّ وَ مَتَى يَحْرُمُ الْأَكْلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 18 – The dawn – what it is, and when is the eating Permissible and when is it Prohibited

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/266)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/266)
text: الْفَجْرُ هُوَ الَّذِي إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُ مُعْتَرِضاً كَأَنَّهُ بَيَاضُ سُورَى .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali Bin Atiyya,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The dawn, it is which, when you see it unobstructed, it is as if it is a white edge’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Ali ibn ‘ Atiyyah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Dawn is when you see it, widthwise, like the whiteness of the suray (canal) (Euphrates river).”’
